station_address: Hindu Colony, L N Road, near Ruia College, Dadar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400014
text: Good fuel quality ,free air pressure service. Car cleaning service is also available. Easy access and exit. No CNG. Tyre puncture service is also available. But most of the time only premium fuel is available and this causes inconvenience to normal fuel users.
